privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic sensor mounting plate for an HC-SR04 ultrasonic sensor. The SVG file (60×30mm with 3mm corner radii) is generated in setup_task.sh and contains 4 M3 mounting holes (3.2mm diameter) positioned at corners and 2 sensor bore cutouts (16mm diameter) centered on the plate. When extruded to 3mm thickness, the solid should have a bounding box of 60×30×3mm and a volume of approximately 4097mm³ after the holes are cut through (within the specified range of 3500-5400mm³). All geometry specifications are consistent with the generated SVG data and CAD requirements.
